_note: Vetted PD candidate pool extracted across the entire Nottingham Music Database ABC_cleaned set (jukedeck/nottingham-dataset, GPLv3). METADATA ONLY — no source ABC is copied here, keeping this manifest free of the dataset's copyleft. Each melody must be RE-AUTHORED as our own song.abc to keep output CC0. Raw ABC reference lives outside the repo.
_pd_rule: Dance-tune collections (jigs/reels/hornpipes/morris/playford/slip/ashover) are anonymous-traditional folk, PD by nature. Waltzes & xmas are per-title vetted; titles whose composer/lyricist died >1955 (AU life+70) are excluded. Spot-check any non-anonymous attribution.
_status: candidate pool for authoring; not yet scaffolded.
